title: OTP Screen - Verify all UI elements are present and correctly displayed
description: Checks for the presence and initial state of all UI components on the OTP Verification screen.
preconditions: User has entered a valid phone number and navigated to the OTP screen.

steps.description: 1. On the OTP screen, verify the Back Button (arrow icon) is visible.
2. Verify the STAGE App Logo is at the top center.
3. Verify the title 'STAGE लॉगिन कोड डालें' is displayed.
4. Verify the subtitle 'हमने +91 XXXXXXXXXX पर 4 अंकों का STAGE कोड भेजा है।' shows the correct phone number.
5. Verify there are 4 separate input boxes for the OTP.
6. Verify the resend timer 'कोड XX सेकंड में फिर से भेजा जाएगा।' is displayed and counting down from 30.
7. Verify the 'Resend OTP' link is initially not visible or disabled.
8. Verify the security note 'सिर्फ आपकी पहचान की पुष्टि के लिए है।' is present with a checkmark icon.

expected_result: All specified UI elements are displayed correctly on the OTP Verification screen.
